project.name: EchoAid
project.description: Mental health platform for students and young professionals

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-[#D8E6DD] bg-white hidden md:flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-[#D8E6DD] md:hidden z-50

component_guidelines.cards: Use bg-white with rounded-3xl and the defined soft shadow. No heavy borders. Internal padding p-6 or p-8.
component_guidelines.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#2D5F5F] text-white rounded-full. Secondary: bg-[#E8F0EA] text-[#1C302B] rounded-full. Add hover lift (-translate-y-0.5).
component_guidelines.inputs: Rounded-xl, bg-[#F4F7F4], border-transparent focus:border-[#2D5F5F] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E8F0EA].
component_guidelines.charts: Use Shadcn charts (Recharts) with deep sage green (#2D5F5F) and terracotta (#C06C5B) lines.
component_guidelines.map: Use Leaflet (react-leaflet) for the Healing Maps page. Ensure map container is rounded-3xl.
component_guidelines.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for a delicate, premium feel.
component_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='mood-button-grateful').

page_specific_instructions.login_register: Use the botanical background image as a split-screen cover or full-bleed with a glassmorphism card (bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl).
page_specific_instructions.home_dashboard: Sidebar on left. Main content grid: Top section for greeting and daily quote. Bento grid for Quick Mood Check-in (5 emojis), Consultation CTA, and Health Correlation chart.
page_specific_instructions.journal_moodtracker: Dual mode: Text and Voice. Voice mode requires a waveform animation (CSS or Framer Motion) and a prominent microphone button. Include a calendar (Emotional Landscape).
page_specific_instructions.healing_maps: Current mood summary on left, list of nearby sanctuaries (using park_maps images) with tags (Nature, Secluded). Right side is a live Leaflet map.
page_specific_instructions.meditation: Featured guide card 'Mastering the 4-7-8 Breathing' with the meditation_cover image. Play button overlaid.
page_specific_instructions.consultation: Search bar, horizontal scrollable category pills. Doctor profile cards with images from media.doctors array. Includes availability pills.
page_specific_instructions.echochat: Chat interface with AI (Dr. Nadia). Distinct message bubbles: teal for doctor, soft mint for user.
page_specific_instructions.profile: Use avatar_ryo. Sections for Sanctuary Preferences, Daily Routine, Privacy (Encryption, Biometric), Guardian Circle.
page_specific_instructions.settings: Clean list layout with toggle switches (Shadcn switch) for notifications and accessibility options.
